sections.paragraph: f. fulness, abundance, specially used of that portion of corn and wine which was to be offered to Jehovah as tithes or first-fruits. The legislator thus signified to the Israelites that that only was asked from them in which they themselves abounded. Used of corn, Exo 22:28, מְלֵאָֽתְךָ וְדמְעֲךָ LXX. ἀπαρχὰς ἅλωνος καὶ ληνοῦ. Deu 22:9, מְלֵאָה הַזֶּרַע וּתְבוּאַת הַכֶּרֶם. Used of wine, Num 18:27, כַּמְלֵאָה מִן הַיָּֽקֶב “like the abundance of the wine-press.” LXX. ἀφαίρεμα ἀπὸ ληνον͂.
